help: Your mastery over the shield protects you from all forms of attacks in the form of defense as well as some moderate damage resistance to most types of damage. Your training with the shield enables you to protect your nearby allies boosting their defenses.
power_short_helps: Self Res (Disorient, Hold, Immobilize, Sleep, Fear, Confuse, Repel, Knockback, Defense Debuff)
PBAoE, Team (but not self) +DEF(All but Psionic), Self +RES(Defense Debuff)
Self, +Res(Disorient, Sleep, Hold, Immobilize, Repel, Knockback, All DMG but Psi), +Recovery, +Max HP
PBAoE Superior DMG(Smashing), Foe Knockdown; Self Teleport
Auto: Self +Res (Cold, Energy, Fire, Negative Energy, Toxic), +MaxHealth
